title: Velvety Italian Garlic Dish
description: A delectable garlic-infused dish perfect for a romantic evening in, featuring pine nuts and designed to be whole30-friendly.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté until golden brown.
Remove the garlic from the skillet and set aside to cool slightly.
In the same skillet, toast pine nuts until lightly golden.
Combine heavy cream with toasted pine nuts and Parmesan cheese in the skillet.
Add finely chopped red peppers (if using) to the saucepan. Stir well and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in cooled garlic to meld flavors.
Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper as needed.
Serve hot over your favorite whole30-friendly pasta or on its own as a light entrée.
